_comment: Import via Settings -> Rules -> Rulesets -> New ruleset -> Import a ruleset. This ruleset locks all release tags matching v* (e.g. v1.2.3) so they can only be created, updated, or deleted by the bypass actors below. Replace placeholder actor_ids (-1) with real GitHub App IDs after import.
name: Protect release tags (v*)

rules._comment: Only bypass actors can create v* tags.
Only bypass actors can move v* tags.
Only bypass actors can delete v* tags.

_bypass_note: Integration bypass actors (github-actions, copilot-swe-agent, dependabot) require app installation IDs that are only accessible via GitHub App auth, not a user OAuth token. Workflows that push to protected branches use AGENT_AUTOMATION_TOKEN (admin PAT) instead, which satisfies the RepositoryRole:Admin (actor_id=5) bypass below.
